data.title: Singaporean Prime Minister Lawrence Wong’s Deep Fake Video Circulated Online and Used to Sell Cryptocurrency
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Singapore Prime Minister Lawrence Wong's deep fake video circulated online and was used to sell cryptocurrencies, money-making schemes and permanent residency applications. Lawrence Wong urged people to be vigilant and not respond to such scams or share personal information. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Japan Proposes Amendments To Payment Services Law
data.description:
According to Foresight News, CoinDesk Japan reports that Japan's Financial Services Agency has submitted a bill to the National Diet proposing amendments to the Payment Services Act. The proposed changes include a review of regulations related to cryptocurrencies and stablecoins. The amendment introduces a system requiring cryptocurrency exchange operators in Japan to hold assets domestically to prevent the outflow of assets, even in the event of bankruptcy of companies dealing solely with physical cryptocurrencies. Additionally, the supporting assets for trust-type stablecoins can be managed in the form of Japanese and U.S. government bonds.

The proposal also aims to establish a new 'intermediary business' for entities that mediate transactions between cryptocurrency exchange operators and users. According to the document, by applying regulations that do not exceed or defend against those using only intermediaries, businesses will find it easier to offer services.

data.title: Singapore PM Warns Against Deepfake Scams Circulating Online
data.description: According to Odaily, a deepfake video of Singapore's Prime Minister Lawrence Wong has been circulating online, being used to promote services such as cryptocurrency sales, money-making schemes, and permanent residency applications. Prime Minister Wong has urged the public to remain vigilant and refrain from responding to these scams or sharing personal information.

data.title: Nasdaq plans to offer 24-hour trading on its stock exchange
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News As the second largest exchange operator in the United States, Nasdaq plans to provide extended trading five days a week, subject to regulatory approval and industry coordination, which is expected to start in the second half of 2026. Cboe Global Markets announced last month that it would extend trading hours on its stock exchange to 24 hours five days a week, pending regulatory approval. The New York Stock Exchange submitted its own application in October, planning to provide 22 hours of trading on weekdays. (Jinshi)

data.title: Sam Bankman-Fried wanted this Tucker Carlson interview for years
data.description:
Sam Bankman-Fried, the former chief executive of bankrupt FTX, appeared on Tucker Carlson's show to "come out as republican."
The post Sam Bankman-Fried wanted this Tucker Carlson interview for years appeared first on Protos.
source: https://protos.com/sam-bankman-fried-wanted-this-tucker-carlson-interview-for-years/

data.title: TON ecological project Yescoin: The founder was taken away by the police due to a business dispute, and the product is still operating normally
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: TON ecosystem project Yescoin issued an announcement on the X platform stating that Yescoin founder and Zhejiang University alumnus Zhang Chi (Zoroo) was taken away from Hangzhou by Shanghai police due to a business dispute with his partner Wang Mouxin (Lao Wang). The case has been upgraded from a civil dispute to a criminal case. The Yescoin team said that although this incident has had an impact on the team, the product is still operating normally.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Backs Global Leadership In Cryptocurrency
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent expressed strong support for the United States to lead the development of cryptocurrencies globally. Besent emphasized the importance of monitoring any future acquisitions of Bitcoin and highlighted the need to prevent the government from selling Bitcoin as a preliminary step to introducing it domestically.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Comments On Bitcoin Purchases
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on March 7, U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent stated that the government will monitor any future Bitcoin purchases. The primary focus is to prevent the government from selling Bitcoin.

data.title: AI May Be Used For Tax Audits, Says U.S. Treasury Secretary
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant has indicated that artificial intelligence, rather than the number of human personnel, may be utilized for auditing tax filings by the U.S. Internal Revenue Service. This development highlights a potential shift in how tax audits are conducted, emphasizing the role of technology in governmental processes.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Reaffirms Strong Dollar Policy
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent stated on March 7 that the strong dollar policy remains unchanged. He emphasized that the economic policies of U.S. President Donald Trump's administration will ultimately strengthen the dollar's position. Besent also highlighted that the United States opposes currency manipulation and will continue to advocate for policies that bolster the dollar.
